SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.logger

Class LoggerCore

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.logger.LoggerCoreMethods
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.logger.LoggerCore
public class LoggerCore extends dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.logger.LoggerCoreMethods
Platform-agnostic logger core with configurable formatting and placeholders.

  • Constructor Details

    • LoggerCore

      public LoggerCore(dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform platform, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.config.ConfigManager configManager, Object placeholderOwner, String pluginName)
      Create a logger core instance.
      Parameters:
      platform - platform adapter
      configManager - config manager
      placeholderOwner - owner key for local placeholders
      pluginName - plugin/mod name for prefix defaults

  • Method Details

    • setExternalPlaceholderEngine

      public void setExternalPlaceholderEngine(ExternalPlaceholderEngine externalPlaceholderEngine)
      Sets external placeholder engine (PlaceholderAPI, MiniPlaceholders, etc).
      Parameters:
      externalPlaceholderEngine - engine instance

    • setEscapePlaceholders

      public void setEscapePlaceholders(boolean escapePlaceholders)
      Controls whether inline {placeholder} values are escaped before MiniMessage parsing. When true, untrusted user input cannot inject MiniMessage tags through placeholders. When false (default), placeholder values can themselves contain MiniMessage markup. Recommended: true for chat output that may contain user-supplied data.
      Parameters:
      escapePlaceholders - true to escape placeholder values

    • reload

      public void reload()
      Reloads logger configuration from disk.

    • parseMessage

      public net.kyori.adventure.text.Component parseMessage(Object message, LogLevel level, LogTarget target, @Nullable @Nullable dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Audience directAudience, @Nullable @Nullable Collection<? extends dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Audience> audienceCollection, Object... placeholdersArgs)
      Parses a message to a component using current logger configuration.
      Parameters:
      message - message input
      level - log level
      target - log target
      directAudience - direct audience
      audienceCollection - audience collection
      placeholdersArgs - placeholder arguments
      Returns:
      rendered component

    • parseMessage

      Parses a message to a component using custom prefix override.

      level - log level
      target - log target
      prefixOverride - prefix override
      directAudience - direct audience
      audienceCollection - audience collection
      placeholdersArgs - placeholder arguments

      public net.kyori.adventure.text.Component parseMessage(Object message, @Nullable @Nullable dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Audience directAudience, @Nullable @Nullable Collection<? extends dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Audience> audienceCollection, Object... placeholdersArgs)

      placeholdersArgs - placeholder arguments

    • send

      message - message input
      audience - direct audience

      broadcast - whether to broadcast

    • resolveColorsForLevel

      public String[] resolveColorsForLevel(LogLevel level, boolean forConsole)
      Resolves colors for the specified log level directly from the active configuration. Falls back to built-in defaults if the configuration isn't available yet.
      Parameters:
      level - log level being rendered
      forConsole - true to use console palette, false for chat palette
      Returns:
      array of colors representing a gradient for the given level/target

    • getChatPrefixMode

      public PrefixMode getChatPrefixMode()
      Returns the chat prefix mode from the active configuration.
      Returns:
      chat prefix mode

      public PrefixMode getConsolePrefixMode()
      Returns the console prefix mode from the active configuration.

      public LogTarget getDefaultTarget()
      Returns the default log target from the active configuration.
      Returns:

    • isLevelEnabled

      public boolean isLevelEnabled(LogLevel level)
      Returns whether a log level is enabled for the default target.
      Parameters:
      level - log level to check
      Returns:
      true when formatting and delivery should proceed

    • isLevelEnabled

      public boolean isLevelEnabled(LogLevel level, LogTarget target)
      Returns whether a log level is enabled for the provided target.
      Parameters:
      level - log level to check
      target - target to evaluate
      Returns:
      true when formatting and delivery should proceed

    • isConsoleStripFormatting

      public boolean isConsoleStripFormatting()
      Returns whether console formatting should be stripped from messages.
      Returns:
      true if console formatting is stripped

    • isConsoleUseGradient

      public boolean isConsoleUseGradient()
      Returns whether console messages should use gradient coloring.
      Returns:
      true if console gradient is enabled
